headline: P&L exposure: ₹1,283 Cr direct provision (engine estimate) + ₹852.2 Cr contingent exposure (engine estimate)
what_matters: P/E compression risk of 0.1x due to earnings hit and governance concerns; margin erosion of 70.4 bps; direct revenue at risk: ₹1,283 Cr (engine estimate), with total exposure up to ₹2,135.2 Cr (engine estimate).
The additional provision and perceived risk could widen bond spreads by 20-40 bps and prompt FII outflows, increasing cost of capital (engine estimate).
Triggers BRSR (mandatory), COSO ERM, and TCFD frameworks; non-disclosure or repeated issues could lead to SEBI scrutiny, trading restrictions, or penalties within 2-8 quarters.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹1,283 Cr direct provision (engine estimate) + ₹852.2 Cr contingent exposure (engine estimate)
Revenue at risk: ₹1,283 Cr direct (engine estimate) + up to ₹852.2 Cr additional contingent exposure (engine estimate)
